generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've always believed in strong alliances for our security. But have you seen how much we're spending to protect others while our own infrastructure crumbles? It's time to prioritize America first. Our allies need to step up and share the burden fairly. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
